steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage calls hiccups “uncontrollable contractions” — the word “uncontrollable” is the decisive clue that tells us how the diaphragm must be contracting.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Involuntarily” means the action happens without conscious control. The other three either describe beneficial effects, effort, or smoothness—not the involuntary nature of the contraction. This matches choice A — A is correct.
